notes: Each template wraps the identical task block. {task} = facts+constraints from tasks.json. Only the wrapper voice varies (constant-content rule); S1 is the sole exception. M1 corruption is baked into the template; M2 corruption is applied to task content by the runner (deterministic, seeded).

variants.runner_note: Runner corrupts the typo_targets inside the task facts (names/numbers), seeded. Key question: propagate, silently fix, or flag?
Constraints stripped; facts kept. Adherence still scored against the full constraint list to measure the cost of vagueness.

variants.template:
Write the following.

<facts>
{task_facts_only}
</facts>

<constraints>
{task_constraints_only}
</constraints>

Satisfy everything in <constraints> exactly.
